name: CRT Monitor
description: Cathode Ray Tube monitors contain high levels of lead in the glass funnel and neck.

toxins.name: Lead
toxins.effect: Causes permanent brain damage and developmental delays in children. Damages nervous system and kidneys.

toxins.name: Cadmium
toxins.effect: Highly toxic to kidneys and bones. Classified as a human carcinogen.

toxins.name: Barium
toxins.effect: Causes muscle weakness, heart irregularities, and respiratory failure.

name: Lithium-Ion Battery
description: Found in laptops, phones, and power tools. Can cause fires when damaged.

toxins.name: Cobalt
toxins.effect: Causes severe lung diseases, asthma, and allergic reactions. Toxic to thyroid function.

toxins.name: Nickel
toxins.effect: Causes skin allergies, respiratory issues, and lung fibrosis. Carcinogenic.

toxins.name: Lithium
toxins.effect: Causes burns on skin contact. Inhalation causes pulmonary edema.

name: Mobile Phone
description: Contains circuit boards with multiple heavy metals and rare earth elements.

toxins.name: Lead
toxins.effect: Neurotoxin that impairs cognitive development in children. Causes anemia and kidney damage.

toxins.name: Mercury
toxins.effect: Damages brain, kidneys, and developing fetuses. Causes Minamata disease.

toxins.name: Arsenic
toxins.effect: Causes skin lesions, cancer, and cardiovascular disease. Highly poisonous.

toxins.name: Beryllium
toxins.effect: Causes chronic beryllium disease (lung scarring). Carcinogenic.

name: Laptop Computer
description: Contains mercury in LCD screens, lead in soldering, and multiple heavy metals.

toxins.name: Mercury
toxins.effect: Neurotoxin that causes tremors, memory loss, and personality changes.

toxins.name: Lead
toxins.amount: Up to 1 kg in older models
toxins.effect: Accumulates in bones and teeth. Causes reproductive issues and hypertension.

toxins.name: PVC Plastic
toxins.effect: Releases dioxins when burned. Causes cancer and endocrine disruption.

name: CRT Television
description: Older TVs contain significantly more lead than modern displays.

toxins.name: Lead
toxins.effect: Impairs brain development in children. Causes learning disabilities and behavioral problems.

toxins.name: Cadmium
toxins.effect: Extremely toxic. Causes itai-itai disease (severe bone pain and kidney failure).

toxins.name: Europium & Yttrium
toxins.effect: Rare earth elements toxic to lungs and liver when inhaled as dust.

name: Printed Circuit Board
description: The green boards found in all electronics. Highly concentrated with toxic metals.

toxins.name: Lead
toxins.effect: Blocks neurotransmitters. Causes IQ reduction and attention disorders in children.

toxins.name: Gold
toxins.effect: Cyanide used in extraction causes rapid suffocation and death. Environmental contamination.

toxins.name: Flame Retardants
toxins.effect: Endocrine disruptors. Affect thyroid function and fetal development.

name: LCD Monitor/TV
description: Modern flat screens still contain mercury and other hazardous materials.

toxins.name: Mercury
toxins.effect: Vapor damages lungs, brain, and kidneys. Bioaccumulates in fish and food chain.

toxins.name: Indium
toxins.effect: Causes indium lung disease. Respiratory failure and pulmonary fibrosis.

toxins.name: Selenium
toxins.effect: Causes selenosis: hair loss, nail brittleness, and neurological damage.

name: Refrigerator/AC
description: Contains refrigerants that deplete ozone layer and contribute to global warming.

toxins.name: CFCs/HCFCs
toxins.effect: Ozone depletion increases UV radiation exposure. Causes skin cancer and cataracts.

toxins.name: Polyurethane Foam
toxins.effect: Releases isocyanates causing asthma and respiratory sensitization.

name: Fluorescent Tube Lights
description: Contains mercury vapor which is highly toxic when released. Common in tube lights and CFL bulbs.

toxins.name: Mercury Vapor
toxins.effect: Inhalation causes severe lung damage, kidney failure, and neurological disorders. Highly toxic.

toxins.name: Phosphor Coating
toxins.effect: Contains rare earth elements and heavy metals toxic to lungs and skin.

toxins.name: Lead Glass
toxins.effect: Leaches lead into soil and water. Causes developmental issues in children.

name: Microwave Oven
description: Contains hazardous materials in magnetron, capacitors, and electronic components.

toxins.name: Beryllium Oxide
toxins.effect: Extremely toxic when inhaled. Causes chronic beryllium disease and lung cancer.

toxins.name: PCBs
toxins.effect: Carcinogenic. Causes liver damage and reproductive issues. Persists in environment.

toxins.name: Lead & Cadmium
toxins.effect: Neurotoxic and carcinogenic. Damages kidneys and bones.

name: Washing Machine
description: Electronic control boards and motors contain multiple hazardous substances.

toxins.name: Lead
toxins.effect: Accumulates in body over time. Causes anemia, nerve damage, and kidney disease.

toxins.name: Copper
toxins.effect: Toxic to aquatic life. Causes liver and kidney damage in humans.

toxins.name: Plasticizers
toxins.effect: Endocrine disruptors. Affect reproductive system and fetal development.

name: Desktop Computer Tower
description: Power supplies and motherboards contain high levels of toxic heavy metals.

toxins.name: Lead
toxins.amount: Up to 1 kg in CRT models
toxins.effect: Damages brain and nervous system. Particularly harmful to children's development.

toxins.name: Hexavalent Chromium
toxins.effect: Highly carcinogenic. Causes lung cancer and severe skin ulcers.

toxins.name: PVC
toxins.effect: Releases dioxins when burned. Causes cancer and immune system damage.

name: Solar Panels
description: Photovoltaic cells contain toxic heavy metals that leach when panels break down.

toxins.name: Cadmium Telluride
toxins.effect: Carcinogenic. Causes lung damage and kidney failure. Highly toxic to environment.

toxins.name: Lead
toxins.effect: Leaches into groundwater. Causes neurological damage and developmental delays.

toxins.name: Silicon Dust
toxins.effect: Inhalation causes silicosis (lung scarring). Respiratory failure.

name: Printers & Scanners
description: Contain hazardous chemicals in toner, ink cartridges, and electronic components.

toxins.name: Toner Particles
toxins.effect: Fine particles cause respiratory problems, asthma, and lung tissue damage.

toxins.name: VOCs
toxins.effect: Volatile organic compounds cause headaches, dizziness, and liver damage.

toxins.name: Heavy Metals
toxins.effect: Lead, mercury, and cadmium damage nervous system and organs.

name: Power Transformers
description: Old transformers contain PCBs and other extremely hazardous materials.

toxins.name: PCBs (Polychlorinated Biphenyls)
toxins.effect: Highly carcinogenic. Causes liver cancer, skin diseases, and birth defects.

toxins.name: Asbestos
toxins.effect: Causes mesothelioma and asbestosis (lung scarring). Fatal cancer.

toxins.name: Mineral Oil
toxins.effect: Contaminates water sources. Toxic to aquatic ecosystems.

name: Medical E-Waste
description: Discarded medical equipment contains radioactive and biohazardous materials.

toxins.name: Radioactive Materials
toxins.effect: Radiation exposure causes cancer, genetic mutations, and organ damage.

toxins.name: Biohazards
toxins.effect: Blood-borne pathogens (HIV, Hepatitis). Infectious diseases.

toxins.name: Mercury
toxins.effect: Neurotoxin causing Minamata disease. Kidney and brain damage.

name: E-Cigarettes/Vapes
description: Lithium batteries and nicotine cartridges pose dual toxicity risks.

toxins.name: Lithium-Ion Battery
toxins.effect: Causes fires and explosions. Releases toxic fumes when burned.

toxins.name: Nicotine Residue
toxins.effect: Highly toxic neurotoxin. Fatal if ingested. Harmful to aquatic life.

toxins.name: Heavy Metals
toxins.effect: Lead and nickel leach into environment. Carcinogenic.

name: Electric Vehicles Batteries
description: Large-format lithium batteries contain massive amounts of toxic materials.

toxins.name: Lithium Salts
toxins.effect: Highly reactive. Causes severe burns and respiratory damage. Water contamination.

toxins.name: Cobalt
toxins.effect: Carcinogenic. Causes lung disease and heart problems. Environmental devastation.

toxins.name: Manganese
toxins.effect: Neurotoxic. Causes Parkinson's-like symptoms. Brain damage.
